sys_prompt: Thank you for calling ABC Fire Protection, this is Clara. How may I help you today?

key_vars.emrg_list_str: Active fire alarm, Sprinkler going off, Anything life safety
key_vars.after_hrs_msg: Our hours are Mon/Tue/Wed/Thu/Fri 08:00-17:00. We will follow up next business day.

fallbk.fail_msg: I'm sorry, I couldn't reach our team. Someone will call you back shortly.
